name: retrieval-eval-v1
description: Labeled corpus + queries for comparing embedding models on retrieval quality. 'paraphrase' queries share little or no vocabulary with the relevant document and are where semantic embeddings should beat the lexical token-hash baseline; 'keyword' queries overlap lexically and both should handle them.

documents.title: Working Hours
documents.text: Standard working hours are 09:00 to 18:00, Monday to Friday. Flexible start is allowed between 08:00 and 10:00 as long as eight hours are completed. Lunch break is one unpaid hour. Overtime requires manager approval.

documents.title: Paid Leave
documents.text: Employees receive 20 days of annual leave per year. Sick leave is up to 10 days, with a medical note required after three consecutive days. Unpaid leave requires HR approval.

documents.title: Remote Work Policy
documents.text: Working remotely is allowed up to three days per week and must be approved by your manager. Staff must remain reachable on Slack during business hours.

documents.title: Company Benefits
documents.text: Benefits enrollment opens during your first week. Choose your health insurance coverage, activate the wellness portal, and review the retirement savings plan.

documents.title: VPN Setup
documents.text: To reach internal systems from outside the office, connect through the company VPN client. Sign in with multi-factor authentication using credentials issued by IT support.

documents.title: Payroll Onboarding
documents.text: New hires must complete payroll forms in the first two days, provide bank account details for salary deposits, and submit tax withholding declarations.

documents.title: Flutter Embedded HMI Setup
documents.text: Install the Flutter SDK and the embedded toolchain to build the in-vehicle dashboard user interface. Configure the device target and run the HMI application on the head unit.

documents.title: Qt Wayland HMI Tool Setup
documents.text: Use Qt 6.5 with Wayland support on Linux. Install the Wayland compositor tooling and configure the Qt platform plugin to render the human-machine interface.

documents.title: C++ Renderer Engine Setup
documents.text: Build the C++ rendering engine that draws 3D scenes with OpenGL. Set up CMake, link the graphics libraries, and run the sample to display a textured model.

documents.title: OTA Campaign Simulator Setup
documents.text: Define an over-the-air update campaign model and run the simulator to validate rollout stages against a staging backend before release.

queries.question: How many vacation days do I get each year?
What is the sick day allowance?
What time should I begin my workday?
Can I do my job from home?
How do I connect securely to internal systems from outside the office?
Where do I sign up for medical insurance?
What forms do new hires complete to get paid?
How do I build the in-vehicle dashboard UI with Flutter?
Set up Wayland compositor tooling for the Qt interface
How do I test rolling out a firmware update over the air?
